emails.subject: ETAs
emails.body: Travis needs to get copies of the ETA's below. I don't know if there is someone here in Houston that can get them for him, or someone in London. I usually would have called Edmund on this but he's out sick for awhile. Can you track it down for us? Thanks! Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 10/25/2000 03:24 PM Travis McCullough 10/25/2000 02:43 PM

emails.subject: ETAs
emails.body: As you can see below, some of the ETAs have been forwarded to Travis. Apparently, the others reside here, but only Frank knows where they are. As he's on a plane back to the US right now, I'll have to get these to you guys tomorrow. Thanks. Forwarded by Lisa Lees/HOU/ECT on 10/26/2000 11:21 AM Enron North America Corp. From: Jason Althaus ENRON 10/26/2000 11:09 AM
